svg.title: Everline v0.1 components batch 2 sheet
svg.desc: Second-batch candidate vector sheet: Sidebar/Navigation rail, Toolbar, Card/Tile, List, Data table, Task card, Kanban column.

g.text: Everline Design Language — Components Batch 2 Sheet
v0.1 candidate · Sidebar/Nav rail, Toolbar, Card/Tile, List, Data table, Task card, Kanban column · sibling to everline-components-master.svg
one component, two modes · expanded 256 px · collapsed (rail) 72 px · item height 48 px
collapsed 第三項展示 notification 徽章；resizing 互動未畫出（見批次擱置事項）
48 px height · 40 px compact · icon-button cluster + divider
generic content container · 16 px radius · 24 px padding · distinct from Task card
dragging 未畫出（見批次擱置事項：拖曳／拖放中視覺）
48 px row · individually-rounded rows + 4 px gap (處處是圓, not adjoining flat dividers) · component.list-item.*
row action：列尾動作按鈕，不觸發選取
empty、loading 未畫出（見批次擱置事項）
single row-height (48 px) only this pass · component.list-item.* rows · density/pagination undecided
看板 B — 資產整理
看板 C — 元件審查
pagination、loading、empty、row/cell error 未畫出（見批次擱置事項）
status dot + title + tags (base) · due-date + assignee (candidate) · extends component.card.*
候選欄位（非正式 Avatar 元件）
dragging 未畫出（見批次擱置事項）
rounded cards + gaps only (處處是圓) · not the flat layout in works/TaylorConceptMockup1.svg (structural reference only)
drag-over、collapsed、loading 未畫出（見批次擱置事項）
